creator: jkois@freebsd.org
text:
Hello,

I have just committed the requested changes.  They should appear on the 
main website/in the documentation with the next 24 hours.  And after 
some delay on all FreeBSD mirrors.

Regarding your question:
The list of mirrors on the FreeBSD website and in the handbook are 
generated from the same source file.  Meaning after a rebuild of the 
website/the documentation the entries for Switzerland should be 
automatically updated on all up-to-date mirrors and for all available 
languages.

Regards


jkois

-- 
  Johann Kois
  jkois(at)FreeBSD.org
  FreeBSD Documentation Project
  FreeBSD German Documentation Project - https://doc.bsdgroup.de
